name: Snow-Covered Almond Crescents
recipeIngredient: 1 cup QUAKER Oats (quick or old-fashioned, uncooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Beat margarine, powdered sugar, and almond extract until fluffy.
3. Add flour and salt; mix until well blended.
4. Stir in oats and almonds.
5. Using level measuring tablespoonfuls, shape dough into crescents.
6. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet for 14-17 minutes or until bottoms are light golden brown.
7. Remove from oven to a wire rack.
8. Sprinkle additional powdered sugar generously over warm cookies.
9. Allow cookies to cool completely.
Makes about 4 dozen cookies.
